title: Spear & Jackson 5LPAPS 5 Litre Pump Action Pressure Sprayer
seller_info_text: Sold by Amazon Resale and Fulfilled by Amazon.
features: Note: The customer should ensure all fittings are tightly secured before use.. Fully adjustable wand nozzle from spray to mist, lockable trigger mechanism and water flow regulator
Translucent graduated bottle in litres and fluid ounces for accuracy when filling or mixing within the bottle
5 Litre (1.3 Gallon) Pump Action Pressure Sprayer with pressure release valve and shoulder strap
Use with water and non viscous water based or soluble products including pesticides, herbicides, insecticides, fungicides, fertilisers
560mm (22") watering wand/lance and 1.3m (51") hose for use in awkward or inaccessible places
Fully adjustable wand nozzle from spray to mist, lockable trigger mechanism and water flow regulator
description: From the manufacturer Spear & Jackson Spear & Jackson has been selling hand, garden, contractors, agricultural and landscaping tools since 1760. The company was founded in the City of Sheffield, which is famous for the production of steel, cutlery and hand tools and continues to be our home over 250 years later. Pump Action Pressure Sprayers The Spear & Jackson range of garden pressure sprayers includes a 2 litre, 5 litre, 5 litre twin pack, 8 litre, and a 15 litre for general purpose garden jobs. A garden essential that can be used for a variety of tasks including plant watering, pests and weeds, plant feeding, patio cleaning and fence treatment. Our easy pump action sprayers all have adjustable nozzles, and are all suitable for use with PH values 5-9. 2LPAPS - 2 Litre Pressure Sprayer 5LPAPS - 5 Litre Pressure Sprayer 5LPAPSTWIN - 5 Litre Twin Pack of Pressure Sprayers 5LPAPSWOOD - 5 Litre Pressure Sprayer for Wood 8LPAPS - 8 Litre Pressure Sprayer 15LPAPS - 15 Litre Pressure Sprayer 3LPUMP - Amazon Exclusive Pressure Sprayer 2 Litre Pressure Sprayer 5 Litre Pressure Sprayer 3 Litre Exclusive Pressure Sprayer 8 Litre Pressure Sprayer 15 Litre Pressure Sprayer Add To Basket Add To Basket Buying Options Add To Basket Add To Basket Customer Reviews 4.2 out of 5 stars 11,083 4.4 out of 5 stars 56,812 4.4 out of 5 stars 56,812 4.4 out of 5 stars 56,812 4.4 out of 5 stars 56,812 Price £8.72 £ 8 . 72 £13.27 £ 13 . 27 — no data £26.14 £ 26 . 14 £40.47 £ 40 . 47 General Purpose ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ Adjustable Nozzle ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ Brass Wand no data no data ✓ no data no data Carrying Strap no data ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ Easy Pump Action ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ Stabilising Skirt no data no data ✓ no data no data Easy-Fill Funnel no data no data ✓ no data no data PH Values 5-9 ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ Need Accessories for your Sprayer? We offer two Sprayer Wands. Standard Extendable Sprayer Wand. Extends up to 770mm (30") and fits Spear & Jackson 5LPAPS and 8LPAPS - REF: SPRAYERWAND. Alternatively our Telescopic Brass Water Wand. Extends up to 745mm (29") and fits Spear & Jackson 3LPUMP, 5LPAPS, 5LPAPSWOOD, 5LPAPSTWIN, 8LPAPS and 15LPAPS - REF. BRASSWAND. Need Accessories for your Sprayer? Set of 0 Ring Seals for 5L Sprayer and 8L Sprayer. Further the usage of your existing sprayer and allows for a wider range of chemicals. Extends usage for a broader range of pH values. Fits Spear & Jackson 5LPAPS and 8LPAPS (5L and 8L Pump Action Pressure Sprayers). REF: 58LPAPSKIT. Need Accessories for your Sprayer? Viton Seals Kit for 5L Sprayer and 8L Sprayer. Stronger and more durable than conventional compressed rubber seals, more suitable for heavy or commercial applications. Increased resistance to chemical substances. Fits Spear & Jackson 5LPAPS and 8LPAPS (5L and 8L Pump Action Pressure Sprayers). REF: 58LPAPSVITKIT Need Accessories for your Sprayer? A Twin Pack of 5L Pump Action Pressure Sprayers, colour coded to identify their different purposes and avoid cross contamination e.g. water/plant feed in one sprayer, and harsh chemicals in the other to avoid mixing.
